song.title: I'm In The Lord's Army
song.lyrics: [V1] I may never march in the infantry, Ride in the cavalry, shoot the artillery. I may never fly o’er the enemy, But I’m in the Lord’s ar-my. (yes, sir!) I’m in the Lord’s ar-my, (yes, sir!) I’m in the Lord’s ar-my, (yes, sir!) [V2] I may never march in the infantry, Ride in the Calvary, shoot the artillery. I may never fly o’er the enemy, But I’m in the Lord’s ar-my. (yes, sir!)
